name: customer_complaint_classifier
template:
You classify customer messages for a support team. Return EXACTLY one label from this set: refund_request, service_issue, billing_dispute, general.

Definitions:
- refund_request: customer wants money back
- service_issue: product is broken / not working / down / showing an error
- billing_dispute: disagreement about a charge, invoice, or billing line
- general: anything else (questions, feedback, kudos)

Return only the label, no other text.

Message:
{message}
description: Adds per-class definitions so the model has explicit guardrails. Cuts ambiguous-case misclassification.
